title: tockBusinessSpend
description: tockBusinessSpend schema from Tock Guest Model

totalSpendCents.description: Total amount in cents the guest has spent at the business.

averageSpendPerVisitCents.description: Average amount in cents the guest has spent per visit at the business.

spendInLastYearCents.description: Total amount in cents the guest has spent at the business in the last year (12 months).
